debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁴ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝³ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X : ι → Ω → E
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsSquareIntegrable ι Ω E inst✝⁴ inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ mΩ X 𝓕 P
i j : ι
hij : i ≤ j
⊢ eLpNorm (X i) 2 P ≤ eLpNorm (X j) 2 P

    _ ≤ ENNReal.ofReal (∫ ω, ‖X j ω‖ ^ 2 ∂P) := ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal h
    _ = ∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal (‖X j ω‖ ^ 2) ∂P := by

    _ = ∫⁻ ω, (‖X j ω‖₊ : ℝ≥0∞) ^ (2 : ℝ) ∂P := by

hX.martingale.eLpNorm_mono one_le_two hij

  have h2' : (2 : ℝ≥0∞) ≠ ∞ := by simp

have h := hX.martingale.condexp_ae_eq_of_le hij (𝓕.le j) (hX.martingale.integrable j)
  calc eLpNorm (X i) 2 P 
      = eLpNorm (P[X j | 𝓕 i]) 2 P := by rw [eLpNorm_congr_ae h.symm]
    _ ≤ eLpNorm (X j) 2 P := eLpNorm_condexp_le
hX.martingale.eLpNorm_mono hij
hX.martingale.eLpNorm_mono one_le_two hij
exact hX.martingale.eLpNorm_mono (by norm_num : (1 : ℝ≥0∞) ≤ 2) hij

have h := hX.submartingale_sq_norm
  rw [eLpNorm_rpow_eq_lintegral_rpow_enorm (by simp : (2 : ℝ≥0∞) ≠ 0) ENNReal.coe_ne_top,
      eLpNorm_rpow_eq_lintegral_rpow_enorm (by simp : (2 : ℝ≥0∞) ≠ 0) ENNReal.coe_ne_top]
  gcongr
  simp only [ENNReal.toReal_ofNat]
  calc ∫⁻ ω, ‖X i ω‖₊ ^ (2 : ℝ) ∂P
      = ∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal (‖X i ω‖ ^ 2) ∂P := by
        congr 1 with ω
        rw [← ENNReal.ofReal_rpow_of_nonneg (norm_nonneg _) (by norm_num : (2 : ℝ) ≠ 0)]
        simp [ENNReal.coe_rpow_of_nonneg]
    _ = ENNReal.ofReal (∫ ω, ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 ∂P) := by
        rw [ENNReal.ofReal_integral_eq_lintegral_ofReal (hX.integrable_sq i).1
          (ae_of_all P (fun ω ↦ sq_nonneg _))]
    _ ≤ ENNReal.ofReal (∫ ω, ‖X j ω‖ ^ 2 ∂P) := by
        gcongr
        exact h.set_integral_le_univ hij (hX.integrable_sq i) (hX.integrable_sq j)
    _ = ∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal (‖X j ω‖ ^ 2) ∂P := by
        rw [ENNReal.ofReal_integral_eq_lintegral_ofReal (hX.integrable_sq j).1
          (ae_of_all P (fun ω ↦ sq_nonneg _))]
    _ = ∫⁻ ω, ‖X j ω‖₊ ^ (2 : ℝ) ∂P := by
        congr 1 with ω
        rw [← ENNReal.ofReal_rpow_of_nonneg (norm_nonneg _) (by norm_num : (2 : ℝ) ≠ 0)]
        simp [ENNReal.coe_rpow_of_nonneg]

have h := hX.submartingale_sq_norm.set_integral_le_set_integral hij MeasurableSet.univ
  simp only [Measure.restrict_univ] at h
  rw [eLpNorm_eq_lintegral_rpow_enorm (by norm_num : (2 : ℝ≥0∞) ≠ 0) (by norm_num : 2 ≠ ⊤),
      eLpNorm_eq_lintegral_rpow_enorm (by norm_num : (2 : ℝ≥0∞) ≠ 0) (by norm_num : 2 ≠ ⊤)]
  simp only [ENNReal.toReal_ofNat, one_div]
  gcongr
  simp only [ENNReal.rpow_natCast]
  calc ∫⁻ ω, ‖X i ω‖₊ ^ 2 ∂P = ∫⁻ ω, ‖‖X i ω‖ ^ 2‖₊ ∂P := by
        congr 1 with ω
        simp [sq_abs, Real.norm_of_nonneg (sq_nonneg _)]
    _ = ∫⁻ ω, ‖(fun ω ↦ ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2) ω‖₊ ∂P := rfl
    _ ≤ ∫⁻ ω, ‖(fun ω ↦ ‖X j ω‖ ^ 2) ω‖₊ ∂P := by
        rw [← ofReal_integral_eq_lintegral_ofReal (hX.integrable_sq i).1
            (Eventually.of_forall fun ω ↦ sq_nonneg _),
            ← ofReal_integral_eq_lintegral_ofReal (hX.integrable_sq j).1
            (Eventually.of_forall fun ω ↦ sq_nonneg _)]
        exact ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal h
    _ = ∫⁻ ω, ‖X j ω‖₊ ^ 2 ∂P := by
        congr 1 with ω
        simp [sq_abs, Real.norm_of_nonneg (sq_nonneg _)]

have h2 : (2 : ℝ≥0∞) ≠ 0 := by norm_num
  have h2' : (2 : ℝ≥0∞) ≠ ∞ := by norm_num
  rw [eLpNorm_rpow_eq_lintegral h2 h2', eLpNorm_rpow_eq_lintegral h2 h2']
  apply ENNReal.rpow_le_rpow _ (by norm_num : 0 ≤ (2 : ℝ)⁻¹)
  simp only [ENNReal.toReal_ofNat]
  have hmart := hX.martingale
  have hi := hmart.condexp_ae_eq hij
  calc ∫⁻ ω, ‖X i ω‖₊ ^ (2 : ℝ) ∂P 
      = ∫⁻ ω, ‖(P[X j | 𝓕 i]) ω‖₊ ^ (2 : ℝ) ∂P := by
        congr 1
        ext ω
        rw [← hi]
      _ ≤ ∫⁻ ω, ‖X j ω‖₊ ^ (2 : ℝ) ∂P := by
        apply MeasureTheory.lintegral_mono_ae
        have := MeasureTheory.enorm_condexp_le (μ := P) (m := 𝓕 i) (f := X j)
        filter_upwards [this] with ω hω
        gcongr
        simp only [← ENNReal.coe_toReal_eq_iff, ne_eq, coe_nnnorm, ENNReal.ofReal_norm_eq_enorm] 
          at hω ⊢
        · exact hω
        · exact ENNReal.rpow_ne_top_of_nonneg (by norm_num) (by simp)
        · exact ENNReal.rpow_ne_top_of_nonneg (by norm_num) (by simp)
hX.martingale.eLpNorm_mono (by norm_num) hij

by_cases hP : P = 0
  · simp [hP]
  have hi := hX.integrable_sq i
  have hj := hX.integrable_sq j
  have hsub := hX.submartingale_sq_norm
  have hint := hsub.integral_mono hij hi hj
  rw [eLpNorm_eq_lintegral_rpow_enorm (by simp) (by simp),
      eLpNorm_eq_lintegral_rpow_enorm (by simp) (by simp)]
  gcongr
  simp only [ENNReal.toReal_ofNat]
  rw [← ofReal_integral_eq_lintegral_ofReal (hi.abs) (ae_of_all _ (fun _ => abs_nonneg _)),
      ← ofReal_integral_eq_lintegral_ofReal (hj.abs) (ae_of_all _ (fun _ => abs_nonneg _))]
  · gcongr
    simp only [Real.rpow_natCast, abs_pow, sq_abs]
    convert hint using 2 <;> ext ω <;> simp [abs_of_nonneg (sq_nonneg _)]

have hsub := hX.submartingale_sq_norm
  have := hsub.integral_le_integral hij
  simp only [eLpNorm_two_pow_eq_integral_norm_sq (hX.integrable_sq _)]
  gcongr

rw [eLpNorm_rpow_eq_lintegral_rpow_enorm (by simp) (by simp)]
  rw [eLpNorm_rpow_eq_lintegral_rpow_enorm (by simp) (by simp)]
  gcongr
  have h := hX.martingale.norm_condexp_le_of_le hij
  calc ∫⁻ ω, ‖X i ω‖₊ ^ (2 : ℝ) ∂P
      = ∫⁻ ω, (‖X i ω‖₊ : ℝ≥0∞) ^ (2 : ℕ) ∂P := by simp [ENNReal.rpow_natCast]
    _ ≤ ∫⁻ ω, (‖X j ω‖₊ : ℝ≥0∞) ^ (2 : ℕ) ∂P := by
        apply hX.martingale.pow_lintegral_enorm_le_lintegral_enorm hij
    _ = ∫⁻ ω, ‖X j ω‖₊ ^ (2 : ℝ) ∂P := by simp [ENNReal.rpow_natCast]

have h := hX.martingale.condexp_ae_eq hij
  calc eLpNorm (X i) 2 P = eLpNorm (P[X j | 𝓕 i]) 2 P := by
        exact eLpNorm_congr_ae h.symm
    _ ≤ eLpNorm (X j) 2 P := eLpNorm_condexp_le (𝓕.le i)
hX.martingale.eLpNorm_mono (by norm_num : 1 ≤ (2 : ℝ≥0∞)) hij

have h := hX.submartingale_sq_norm.integral_mono hij (hX.integrable_sq i) (hX.integrable_sq j)
  rw [eLpNorm_eq_lintegral_rpow_enorm (by simp) (by simp),
      eLpNorm_eq_lintegral_rpow_enorm (by simp) (by simp)]
  simp only [ENNReal.toReal_ofNat, one_div]
  gcongr
  rw [← ofReal_integral_eq_lintegral_ofReal (hX.integrable_sq i).1 
        (eventually_of_forall (fun ω ↦ sq_nonneg _)),
      ← ofReal_integral_eq_lintegral_ofReal (hX.integrable_sq j).1
        (eventually_of_forall (fun ω ↦ sq_nonneg _))]
  · gcongr
    simp only [Real.rpow_natCast] at h
    convert h using 2 <;> ext ω <;> simp [sq_abs, Real.norm_rpow_of_nonneg (norm_nonneg _)]
exact hX.martingale.eLpNorm_mono (by norm_num : (1 : ℝ≥0∞) ≤ 2) hij
hX.martingale.eLpNorm_mono one_le_two hij

have h := hX.submartingale_sq_norm.set_integral_le (𝓕.le i) hij MeasurableSet.univ
  simp only [Measure.restrict_univ] at h
  rw [eLpNorm_two_eq_sqrt_eLpNorm_sq_norm, eLpNorm_two_eq_sqrt_eLpNorm_sq_norm]
  gcongr
  rw [eLpNorm_one_eq_lintegral_enorm, eLpNorm_one_eq_lintegral_enorm]
  simp only [Real.enorm_eq_ofReal_abs, sq_abs]
  rw [← ofReal_integral_eq_lintegral_ofReal, ← ofReal_integral_eq_lintegral_ofReal]
  · exact ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal h
  · exact (hX.integrable_sq j).1
  · exact fun ω ↦ sq_nonneg _
  · exact (hX.integrable_sq i).1
  · exact fun ω ↦ sq_nonneg _
exact hX.martingale.eLpNorm_mono (by norm_num : 1 ≤ (2 : ℝ≥0∞)) hij
exact hX.martingale.eLpNorm_mono hij

rw [eLpNorm_eq_lintegral_rpow_enorm (by norm_num) (by norm_num),
      eLpNorm_eq_lintegral_rpow_enorm (by norm_num) (by norm_num)]
  gcongr
  have hsub := hX.submartingale_sq_norm
  have h := hsub.lintegral_le hij
  simp only [ENNReal.rpow_ofNat] at h ⊢
  convert h using 2 <;> ext ω <;> simp [ENNReal.ofReal_pow (norm_nonneg _)]

rw [eLpNorm_rpow_eq_lintegral_rpow_enorm (by norm_num : 2 ≠ 0) (by norm_num : 2 ≠ ⊤),
      eLpNorm_rpow_eq_lintegral_rpow_enorm (by norm_num : 2 ≠ 0) (by norm_num : 2 ≠ ⊤)]
  gcongr
  have h_sub := hX.submartingale_sq_norm
  have hi := h_sub.set_integral_le_univ hij (hX.integrable_sq j)
  simp only [Measure.restrict_univ] at hi
  rw [integral_eq_lintegral_of_nonneg_ae, integral_eq_lintegral_of_nonneg_ae] at hi
  · simp only [Real.enorm_eq_abs, sq_abs, ENNReal.ofReal_pow (norm_nonneg _)] at hi
    convert hi using 2 <;> ext ω <;> simp [sq_abs, ← ENNReal.rpow_natCast]
  · exact ae_of_all _ fun ω ↦ sq_nonneg _
  · exact (hX.integrable_sq j).aestronglyMeasurable
  · exact ae_of_all _ fun ω ↦ sq_nonneg _
  · exact (hX.integrable_sq i).aestronglyMeasurable
